# awscc_dms_certificate (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::DMS::Certificate



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `certificate_arn` (String) The certificate Arn
- `certificate_identifier` (String) The certificate Identifier
- `certificate_pem` (String) The certificate Pem
- `certificate_wallet` (String) The certificate Wallet
